app.name: CareerCoach
app.tagline: AI-powered career coaching, job search, and skill development platform
app.description: A microservices monorepo that helps users build their career profile from CV / GitHub / LinkedIn, chat with an AI coach (with persistent career profile + multi-mode conversations), match skills against jobs, manage a job application pipeline, and plan a long-term career roadmap. Includes an admin management console with token-usage analytics and a multi-provider LLM stack with automatic fallback.

techStack.architecture: Microservices: 4 services + 1 SPA, all Fastify + Mongo where applicable

services.name: users-service
services.purpose: Auth, profile, CV, OAuth callbacks, admin (users + LLM token usage)

services.name: chat-service
services.purpose: AI coach: conversation modes, career-profile materialization, chat→pipeline

services.name: job-service
services.purpose: Jobs catalog, pipeline, skill matcher, career roadmap, job poller

routes.page: Sign in / Sign up + GitHub & LinkedIn OAuth
Skills from CV + GitHub + skill gaps

flows.name: User Registration with CV Upload
flows.purpose: New users create an account; CV is parsed and enriched with achievements.

endpoints.notes: Multipart: firstName, lastName, email, password, cvFile (PDF)

dataFlow: CV uploaded to S3 (URL stored on user)

flows.name: Email/Password Sign In & Token Refresh
flows.purpose: Authenticate returning users and keep sessions alive transparently.
dataFlow: Frontend apiFetch() silently refreshes JWT on 401 and retries

flows.name: GitHub OAuth & Skill Import
flows.purpose: Sign in / link GitHub; import public repos' languages as skills.

endpoints.notes: Exchanges code; popup posts GITHUB_CODE via postMessage

dataFlow: Parent calls backend callback, exchanges code → user
Frontend fetches repos, aggregates languages → githubSkills on user

flows.name: LinkedIn OAuth (OpenID Connect)
flows.purpose: Sign in with LinkedIn; pulls name + email only (skills require Partner access).
dataFlow: Backend exchanges code for ID token + userinfo

flows.name: Profile Management & CV Re-upload
flows.purpose: View / edit profile; replace CV → re-extract skills via Gemini chain.

endpoints.notes: Partial updates: bio, location, achievements, etc.
PDF → parse + Gemini Files API → achievements

dataFlow: PDF parsed + sent to LLM chain with extraction prompt

flows.name: AI Career Coach Chat
flows.purpose: Multi-conversation chat that detects intent mode (GUIDED / FAST_SEARCH / DEEP_DISCOVERY) and grounds replies in the user's persistent career profile.

endpoints.notes: Ensure a conversation exists (creates if none)
Send message; returns reply + detected mode + confidence + attachedJobs[]

dataFlow: ConversationModeService detects mode from message + signals
Career profile loaded / materialized for context
Prompt built (mode + profile + history) and sent to LLM chain
On failure: fallback adapter switches to next provider
Reply persisted; attachedJobs (if any) returned for UI
SeniorityInferenceService updates seniority signal on profile

flows.name: Chat → Add Job to Pipeline
flows.purpose: User accepts a chat-suggested job → it lands on their pipeline board.

frontend.trigger: Click 'Add to pipeline' on a suggested job card

dataFlow: Chat recommends job (attachedJobs[] in assistant reply)
On success: 'Done — I added the {title} role to your pipeline'
On failure: fallback message instructs user to add it manually

flows.name: Career Profile Materialization
flows.purpose: Persistent, embedding-indexed profile that grows from CV + chat interactions; replaces the old conversation-memory feature.
dataFlow: On first conversation, careerProfiles doc created for userId
LLM infers signals: strengths, preferredRoles, domains, technologies, goals, seniority…
Each signal carries {value, confidence, evidence[], source}
All subsequent chats hydrate prompts from this profile

flows.name: Skill Matcher for Jobs
flows.purpose: Score user skills against the requirements of a specific job.
dataFlow: Aggregate match score back to UI

flows.name: Job Search & Suggestions
flows.purpose: Browse and filter aggregated jobs; results re-ranked using seniority compatibility.
dataFlow: Background poller ingests jobs into MongoDB
Results rendered with save / add-to-pipeline actions

flows.name: Upload Job Posting
flows.purpose: Users add a job that the poller hasn't picked up; the description is enriched (skills, requirements, salary) via the LLM chain and indexed for search.

endpoints.notes: Body: { jobTitle, company, url, description, seniority, salary? } → 201 EnrichedJob. LinkedIn direct-import skipped: requires Talent Solutions Partner access. Users paste the LinkedIn job URL + description text instead.

dataFlow: User fills modal: title, company, url, seniority, salary?, description
Server builds AdaptedJob with a uuid id
enrichByGemini extracts requirements/benefits/skills + builds searchEmbedding (falls back to inferFallback on LLM error)
Job list refreshes; the new job appears in search and skill-matching

flows.name: Job Application Pipeline
flows.purpose: Kanban board tracking jobs through user-defined stages (wishlist → applied → interview → offer / rejected).

flows.name: Career Roadmap
flows.purpose: Plan multi-stage progression toward a dream role with milestones.
dataFlow: Load existing roadmap or create new
Edit / remove stages as plan evolves

flows.name: Admin: User Management
flows.purpose: Search, paginate, promote, demote, and delete users (admin role only).
dataFlow: List users with search + page params

flows.name: Admin: LLM Token Usage Analytics
flows.purpose: Visualize per-day token consumption by provider, model, operation, and per-user average.

flows.name: LLM Fallback Chain (system)
flows.purpose: Resilient LLM calls: try primary provider, fall back through alternates on error / rate-limit.

frontend.trigger: Any LLM call (chat, CV extract, embeddings)

dataFlow: buildTextCompletionLlmChain() composes adapter list per env
On error: warn + try next adapter
Every attempt logged to llmTokenUsage (with requestStatus / errorMessage)

flows.name: Token Usage Tracking (system)
flows.purpose: Record every LLM call with provider, model, operation, user, and token counts.
dataFlow: Token-usage repository middleware wraps LLM adapter calls
Per-call doc inserted: {createdAt, sourceService, operation, userId, provider, model, promptTokens, completionTokens, totalTokens, tokenStatus, requestStatus}

absentFeatures.name: Wanted-jobs collection (chat 'job not yet in DB')
Direct LinkedIn job-posting API import
absentFeatures.status: not feasible without LinkedIn Talent Solutions Partner access
absentFeatures.trackedBy: Task #1 — closed as 'paste URL + description' instead
